author: lOrm
content:
REDO of prior dispatch. The earlier session reported #741 fixed but the source diff was clobbered by parallel-agent contention -- HEAD 16d4b4a0 still showed the pre-fix shape on disk.

Re-applied from scratch:

**#741a -- atomic save (src/migrations/ledger.rs)**
- save() returns anyhow::Result<()> (was io::Result<()>)
- Builds sibling tmp path: migrations.tmp.<pid>.<nonce> using static AtomicU64 fetch_add(SeqCst)
- Unix: chmod 0o600 on tmp BEFORE rename so final inode is never world-readable
- File::open(&tmp)?.sync_all()? fsync before rename
- fs::rename(&tmp, path) -- POSIX atomic on same filesystem
- Every failure path does best-effort let _ = fs::remove_file(&tmp) cleanup
- Mirrors src/plugins/install.rs::InstalledPlugins::save

**#741b -- load corruption surfaces (src/migrations/ledger.rs)**
- load() signature: -> Self  =>  -> anyhow::Result<Self>
- ENOENT => Ok(Self::default()) (expected first-run state)
- Existing file + parse or IO fail => Err with path context. Corrupt file is preserved on disk for forensic inspection.
- src/migrations/mod.rs::run_all now match-arms load(), warn-logs the error and falls back to default. Signal emitted at the boundary, not swallowed at the source.

**Tests (src/migrations/tests.rs)** -- replaced bug-asserting corrupt_ledger_treated_as_empty with 5 new tests:
- fix741b_corrupt_ledger_surfaces_error_not_silent_empty (also asserts corrupt file remains for forensics)
- fix741b_missing_file_is_ok_empty_ledger
- fix741a_save_load_round_trip_preserves_state
- fix741a_concurrent_save_never_leaves_corrupt_file (8 threads x 25 writes + spinning reader + zero-stray-tmp-files assertion)
- fix741a_saved_ledger_has_0o600_permissions_on_unix (#[cfg(unix)])

**Verification (forensic)**:
- migrations:: tests: 11/11 pass
- full lib suite: 1488 passed / 0 failed (baseline 1484 + 5 new - 1 replaced = 1488)
- cargo clippy -D warnings against src/migrations/*: 0 errors
- One pre-existing clippy error (dead_code in src/permissions.rs) is on baseline 16d4b4a0 too -- verified by git stash + clippy = same error. Out of scope for #741.

**Hard constraints honored**: zero #[allow], zero clippy.toml change, zero #[ignore]. Diff: ledger.rs +165/-32, mod.rs +17/-2, tests.rs +189/-9.
